i drew the realm pfp

!!️CONTENT WARNING: PSYCHOLOGICAL HORROR IF GONE TOO FAR!!️

Yeah, I just made this. Got bored.

A realm of your choice. You can do anything. Anything at your own expense. You can create other people even. Treat this world as a sheet of paper, you can draw and write things, yet you can also remove them.

PLEASE get popular, I put effort into this 😭

Oh yeah, this is actually a finished bot, there isn't really anything I could add here...so uh...good luck i guess, idk.
